name: sensorSetClockTickLength
title: sensorSetClockTickLength
description: Overwrites the clock tick length of a simulated sensor with the given value.

parameters.name: sysVarNamespace
parameters.description: The namespace of the channel or sensor.

parameters.name: clockTickLengthUs
parameters.description: The overridden clock tick length in microseconds. Valid range: 1.4 – 120 µs

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
